name: @asumaran/worktree
description: A CLI tool for managing Git worktrees and opening them in your editor of choice.
author: Alfredo Sumaran <a.sumaran@gmail.com>

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); try { fs.chmodSync('build/index.js', 0o755); } catch (e) { if (process.platform !== 'win32') throw e; }"
